_comment: Trigger eval for executive-lensing skill. 10 positive + 10 negative = 20 cases. Used with skill-creator's run_loop.py to optimize the description for triggering accuracy after the /csuite → /executive-lensing rename. Mix exercises explicit invocation, multi-functional decisions described casually, and near-miss negatives that share C-suite keywords without warranting multi-lens analysis.

evals.query: /executive-lensing
We're thinking about acquiring SmallCo for $40M next quarter. Our cash position is healthy but I'm worried about integration. Can you stress-test this from multiple angles before we pull the trigger?
thinking of pivoting our SaaS company from SMB to enterprise. what could go wrong
our CTO wants to rewrite the auth system in Rust. CEO says do it. CFO hasn't weighed in. Should we?
Considering raising a $20M Series B at a flat valuation to extend runway 18 months. Is this the right call?
we're 6 people considering opening a London office. revenue is $3M ARR mostly US. main risks?
should we open-source our core product? our investors are pushing back hard
looking at outsourcing customer support to a vendor in the Philippines. need to think through this carefully — there are people, brand, and cost angles
i'm a founder considering replacing my COO who's been with me for 3 years. it's messy and i need to think through it from every angle
we're deciding whether to launch our v2 in January or hold for Q2 — engineering says they need more time, sales says we'll lose deals if we wait
what does CFO stand for?
explain the difference between EBITDA and net income
what frameworks do C-suite executives use for prioritization?
summarize the latest earnings report from Microsoft
write me a job description for a CFO
what's the typical org chart for a startup at Series A?
i just wrote a memo to my exec team about Q4 priorities, can you review it for clarity and tone?
i'm preparing for an interview for a CMO role at a fintech, what should i expect?
fix this typescript bug in my checkout flow: const total = items.reduce((a,b) => a + b.price)
help me debug why my Looker dashboard isn't showing real-time revenue data
